name: integration_99_of_mobile_apps_never_hit_10k__mont
method:
99% of mobile apps never hit $10k / month.

My last app hit $44k/month, and my current app is at $90k/month.

Here’s how to take your app to $10k/month in 2025:

phases.name: data_gather
steps: playwright_fetch_cravotta_thread — extract full tactic list from tweet thread

phases.name: synthesis
steps: build_growth_checklist — convert thread tactics into structured JSON checklist with weights
audit_each_app — score all 47 live apps against checklist, flag ASO gaps, missing paywalls, no review prompts, no push notifications, no cross-promo

phases.name: output
steps: generate_optimization_queue — ranked list of (app, tactic, estimated_lift) written to OPS/APP_OPTIMIZATION_QUEUE.md
generate_content — 3 tweets + 1 thread from the framework using engagement_bait_converter.py
